name: Awithlaknannai Mosona
author: Abstract Games factory
description: A Zuni 'fighting serpents' game in the Alquerque family, played on an elongated serpent lattice of 25 points (a strip of triangles). Step along a line, or jump an adjacent enemy draughts-style; captures are compulsory and chain. Capture all the enemy to win. The size option selects Kolowis Awithlaknannai, Culin's long 49-point board with 23 men per side.
